commands.name: adk
commands.description: Create, build, and deploy MapLarge Application Developer Kit (ADK) projects and extensions

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize an ADK project by downloading version info, plugin dependencies, and typescript declarations, and configuring compile settings

commands.name: run
commands.description: Builds the ADK project's client-side code and starts the ADK web server

commands.name: build
commands.description: Builds the client-side (TypeScript) of an ADK project.

commands.name: create-project
commands.description: Creates a new ADK project

commands.name: create-extension
commands.description: Adds an ADK extension based on a template (optional)

commands.name: list-templates
commands.description: List all available extension templates

commands.name: update-version
commands.description: Updates the support files in the .adk folder with the versions bundled with the currently installed CLI

commands.name: package
commands.description: Packages the specified extensions.

commands.name: deploy
commands.description: Packages and deploys the specified extensions.

commands.name: version
commands.description: Display the ADK version of the current project

commands.name: config
commands.description: Display the configuration settings of the current ADK project

commands.name: exec-script
commands.description: Execute an automation script.

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Name of the script to execute.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Create a new project, extension, or component.

commands.name: project
commands.description: Create a new project.

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Name of the new project. Names must be alphanumeric and can contain dashes and underscores. Spaces are not allowed. Use '.' to create in the current directory.

commands.name: extension
commands.description: Create a new extension.

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Name of the new ADK extension (alphanumeric, dashes and underscores allowed; no spaces).

commands.name: component
commands.description: Create a new component.

arguments.name: nameOrPath
arguments.description: Name or path of the new component. If only a name, the component will be created in its default location. If providing a path, it must be relative to the client directory for client components or the server directory for server components and include the name of the component as the last part.

commands.name: feature
commands.description: Add a feature to an extension.

commands.name: admin
commands.description: Administer MapLarge server instances

commands.name: delete

commands.description: get group detail.

commands.name: remove-user
commands.description: Remove a user from a group.

commands.name: update
commands.description: Update an existing group.

commands.description: Update an existing user.

commands.name: cluster

commands.description: Retrieve a JSON object describing the cluster status.

commands.description: Retrieve a cluster token.

commands.name: create
commands.description: create a cluster.

commands.name: purge
commands.description: Purge the database of a cluster node.

commands.name: remove
commands.description: Remove a node from an existing cluster.

commands.name: snapshot
commands.description: Take a snapshot on the designated node.

commands.name: join
commands.description: Remove a node from an existing cluster.

commands.name: alter
commands.description: Alter a cluster node.

commands.name: config
commands.description: Modify the configuration of the CLI tool

commands.name: create-profile
commands.description: Creates a profile for authenticating against a MapLarge server.

commands.description: Updates an existing profile for authenticating against a MapLarge server

commands.name: delete-profile
commands.description: Deletes an existing authenticate profile

commands.name: list-profiles
commands.description: Prints the full list of saved profiles

commands.name: clear-profiles
commands.description: Removes all profiles from the CLI configuration

commands.name: search-profiles
commands.description: Search profiles by keyword

commands.description: Run self-tests on the installed CLI

commands.name: run
commands.description: Launch the CLI validator console application

commands.description: Print out path to validator executable

commands.name: login

commands.description: Display the CLI version

commands.description: The MapLarge CLI allows users to submit query requests to a MapLarge server instance.

commands.description: execute a query to server.

commands.name: table
commands.description: Utilities for importing, exporting, and managing tables on a MapLarge server.

commands.name: list
commands.description: List all tables under a specific account on the MapLarge server.

commands.name: export
commands.description: Export a table from the MapLarge server.

commands.name: list-tags
commands.description: List tags of a specific table from the MapLarge server.

commands.name: get-tag
commands.description: Get a specific tag from a table in the MapLarge server.

commands.name: delete-tag
commands.description: Delete a specific tag from a table in the MapLarge server.

commands.name: delete-row
commands.description: Delete a specific row from a table in the MapLarge server.

commands.name: delete-version
commands.description: Delete a specific version from a table in the MapLarge server.

commands.name: create-tag
commands.description: Create a specific tag in a table on the MapLarge server.

commands.name: update-tag
commands.description: Update a specific tag in a table on the MapLarge server.

commands.name: create-empty
commands.description: create an empty table to server.

commands.name: list-versions
commands.description: get the list of table versions for a specific table.

commands.name: active-version
commands.description: get the active table version for a specific table.

commands.name: get-version
commands.description: get a specific table version.

commands.name: truncate-rows
commands.description: Truncate all rows of a table.

commands.name: create-table
commands.description: Create a new table asynchronously.

commands.name: imports
commands.description: get a specific import by id.

commands.name: delete
commands.description: Delete all versions of the specified table.

commands.name: watch
commands.description: Special command to watch a file/directory and execute a command.

commands.name: docs

commands.description: Generate or print out path to CLI docs.

commands.name: json
